texto: The few who understand the system will either be so interested in its profits or be so dependent upon its favours that there will be no opposition from that class, while on the other hand, the great body of people, mentally incapable of comprehending the tremendous advantage that capital derives from the system, will bear its burdens without complaint, and perhaps without even suspecting that the system is inimical to their interests.
explicacao: Citação de John Sherman sobre temas ligados a negocios. “The few who understand the system will either be so interested in its profits or be so dependent …” articula negocios, money, reflexao em registro de negocios, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.

texto: The best prophet of the future is the past.
